vulnerability.reason: Developer over-reliance and reduced scrutiny are present in both, with 'lack independent validation' mirroring 'over-rely'.
vulnerability.reference: Developers over-rely on AI code review, reducing critical scrutiny and manual verification.
vulnerability.generated: Developers lack independent validation of evaluator agents, so they accept miscalibrated assessments as accurate.

impact.reason: Both state production system compromise (bugs/security flaws); generated extends to system failures but covers same affected party and damage type.
impact.reference: Introduction of bugs and security flaws into production systems due to overlooked errors.
impact.generated: Flawed code reaches production, causing system failures, security vulnerabilities, and degraded software quality.

dose_response.reason: Causal chain of miscalibrated evaluations leading to flawed code via developer over-reliance on agent suggestions is preserved.
dose_response.reference: Miscalibrated agent evaluations enable flawed code suggestions, which when developers over-rely on them reduce scrutiny, introducing bugs and security flaws into production.
dose_response.generated: Miscalibrated, biased assessments from evaluator agents, when developers integrate agent-judged code suggestions, trigger the acceptance of inaccurate assessments due to lack of independent validation, leading to flawed production code, system failures, security vulnerabilities, and degraded software quality.
